The [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] had a '''sparring arena''' that was a large chamber located deep within the walls of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. While destroyed during the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Temple and the arena were [[New Jedi Temple|reconstructed]] for use by the [[New Jedi Order|reformed Order]].

==History==
Constructed within the Jedi Temple sometime after its reconstruction in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], the Sparring Arena was used for nearly a millennia as the site of the annual [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice Tournament]].<ref name="YDR" /> In addition to the contest, the room was used as a combat training center just as any other training facility at the Temple.<ref name="Obi-Wan game">[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']]</ref>

It was within this chamber during the [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] Tournament that [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ilena Xan]] led that [[Standard year/Legends|year's]] senior [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|apprentices]] in the contest, a group which included Jedi apprentices [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]], [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]], [[Hanna Ding]], [[Lena Missa]], and several others.<ref name="YDR" />

Soon after the final Tournament, the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] was [[Order 66/Legends|ordered]] to [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|seize]] the Temple following a [[Showdown on Coruscant|"Jedi Rebellion"]] against the [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Office of the Supreme Chancellor]]. Thousands of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] raided the Temple and slaughtered all of the Jedi within. The Arena was left in ruins, and fell into disuse.<ref name="ROTS" /> The Temple sat in the hands of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], virtually empty excluding the small occupying force of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. It was not until the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] drove the Empire off Coruscant that the Temple was reclaimed by the [[New Jedi Order|reformed Jedi Order]]. Leading the small group of Jedi, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] briefly occupied the Temple and routed the Empire's agents still stationed there. While making use of the facility for several years, it was eventually abandoned again during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] when it was reduced to rubble.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''</ref>

When the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] reclaimed Coruscant, [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] ordered the restoration of the Temple on behalf of the valiant Order and their sacrifices during the war. Built by the [[Reconstruction Authority]], the [[New Jedi Temple|Temple]] was rebuilt and the Sparring Arena restored. Once more used for [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] training, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] Skywalker brought his son, [[Ben Skywalker|Ben]], here during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] to test whether or not [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] was providing adequate [[Jedi training/Legends|instruction]].<ref name="LOTFT">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>

==Layout==
A bowl-shaped chamber deep within the Temple, the vault was completely [[Color/Legends|white]], with white mats spread amongst the floor near the wall for spectators to sit and observe.<ref name="YDR" /> The center or the chamber was used for combat and was typically kept bare, however, balance beams, swings, and wobble and [[foamsteel]] balls, along with other distractions, could be littered around the chamber.<ref name="LOTFT" />

From the upper level control booth, a Jedi or tech operator could set the room to one of five settings. Changes in the room included fluctuating gravity, change in interior lighting, temperature manipulation, as well as more varied weather and other variables. The room was equipped with a safety shield that would catch any apprentices who lost balanced and fell from a dangerous height. The shield projector was located in the floor so that it could cover the entire chamber.<ref name="LOTFT" />

==Appearances==
